scripts.dev: cross-env SOFTPROG_PARSER_DIR=parser concurrently -k -n srv,vite -c blue,green "node server/index.js" "vite"
scripts.dev:all: cross-env SOFTPROG_PARSER_DIR=parser concurrently -k -n srv,vite -c blue,green "node server/index.js" "vite"
scripts.release:all: npm run obfuscate:parser && npm run release
scripts.release:all:docker: npm run obfuscate:parser:docker && npm run release
scripts.release:all:docker:sudo: cross-env SOFTPROG_DOCKER_SUDO=1 node tools/obfuscate-parser-docker.mjs && npm run release
scripts.prod: npm run build && node tools/assert-dist-accounts-detailed.mjs && cross-env NODE_ENV=production node server/index.js
